candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line at the top of the income statement; best match for total revenue/sales.
Not operating revenue; financial income should not be used for top-line sales.
Investment income, not core revenue.
Tax line, unrelated to revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attributable to minority interest, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Total comprehensive income for the period
candidates.why: Bottom-line comprehensive income, not revenue.
Liability/deferred revenue balance sheet item, not recognized top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue row. Although 'Net revenue' also appears in the statement, it was not in the candidate list and 'Revenue' is the preferred reported sales line.

candidates.why: Direct service delivery / subcontractor cost immediately below revenue; best proxy for cost of sales in this service business.

variables.notes: This appears to be the direct cost line analogous to cost of sales/COGS for a staffing/services company.

candidates.why: Major overhead/personnel expense and valid SG&A component.
Overhead bucket above operating profit; valid SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A row and per rule should be preferred when present.

candidates.row_label: Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles - Gross
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset row, not an expense component.
Equity reserve, not operating expense.

variables.notes: Per SG&A hierarchy, an explicit SG&A row exists, so selected only 'Selling&general exp.'. Did not add 'Research & Development Expenditure - Total' because the explicit SG&A row likely already includes R&D and adding it would risk double counting.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D line explicitly labeled as research and development expenditure.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists. It appears below the operating profit section, so mapped to XRD only and not added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Total recurring finance cost line, but underlying components are available so less preferred.
Direct interest expense component; should be included.
Recurring finance-cost component; suitable to include alongside interest expense.
Lease interest/finance cost component; recurring financing cost and suitable for XINT.
Balancing/remaining row should be excluded.
Minority interest allocation, not finance cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure duplicates lease-related finance cost already captured by 'Financial expenses IFRS 16'.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.
Equity/NCI, not finance cost.
Equity/NCI, not finance cost.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance-cost components instead of total 'Finance costs'. Excluded FX loss and derivative rows as non-interest/valuation items. Excluded supplemental lease-interest row to avoid double counting with 'Financial expenses IFRS 16'.

candidates.row_label: Share of profit (loss) of associates and joint ventures accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Income statement earnings line, not book equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Income statement OCI line, not balance sheet equity.

candidates.row_label: Investments accounted for using equity method
candidates.why: Asset investment line, not shareholders' equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent
candidates.why: Preferred owner-attributable equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests here, so less preferred for BE when separate NCI exists.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to owners of parent

variables.notes: Preferred owner-attributable equity because separate non-controlling interest is available, avoiding double counting in BE + MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation item, but balance sheet NCI line is preferred for MIB.
Direct balance sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Equivalent balance sheet label; good fallback/alternate label across years.
Income statement allocation item, not preferred when balance sheet NCI exists.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: OCI allocation, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet NCI labels as priority list because both appear and may be used differently across years.
